g.text: foundation — everything else depends on this, nothing here depends on anything
concrete subclasses — own primitive data, route to operator
operator interfaces + implementations, assembled by OpsProvider
expression layer — depends on core + ops, NDArray never imports from here

svg.text: expr → ops → array → core (arrows point toward what you import)
core imports nothing. NDArray never imports from expr. ops never imports from array.
OpsProvider is in core as an interface — implementations live in ops subpackages.
